# @stll/fuzzy-search

NAPI-RS bindings for fuzzy string matching via Myers'
bit-parallel algorithm. Exposes multi-pattern fuzzy
search and a standalone edit-distance helper for
Node.js and Bun.

Install:

  npm install @stll/fuzzy-search
  # or
  bun add @stll/fuzzy-search

## API

```typescript
import { FuzzySearch, distance } from "@stll/fuzzy-search";

const search = new FuzzySearch(
  [{ pattern: "hello", distance: 1 }],
  { wholeWords: false },
);

search.isMatch("helo world"); // true
distance("kitten", "sitting"); // 3
```

For browser usage, use the separate
`@stll/fuzzy-search-wasm` package.

If you use the browser package with Vite, import
`@stll/fuzzy-search-wasm/vite` and add the plugin
to your Vite config so the generated WASM loader is
not pre-bundled into broken asset URLs.
